name: Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Butter and flour two nine-inch cake pans.
Cream butter and sugar until fluffy. Add eggs, and beat for two minutes. Add banana, and beat for two minutes. Sift together dry ingredients and add to batter alternately with buttermilk. Stir in nuts. Pour into cake pans and gently press coconut onto batter. Bake 30 minutes or until done. Remove from oven and cool in pans for ten minutes. Turn onto racks to cool thoroughly.
To prepare filling, combine sugar, flour, cream, and butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Stir until mixture thickens. Do not boil. Stir in salt, pecans, and vanilla.
Remove from heat to cool.
Put one cake layer on a serving plate. Spread top with half the filling mixture. Place other layer on top and spread remaining filling on top.
To prepare frosting, cream butter until light and add half the sugar, beating constantly. Add milk and remaining sugar alternately until mixture achieves spreading consistency. Blend in vanilla. Frost sides of the cake and sprinkle with coconut to garnish, if desired.
